items.title: Someone recently suggested to me that the reason OpenClaw moment was so big is because it…
items.title_zh: 最近有人向我建议，OpenClaw 时刻如此重要的原因是……
items.description: Someone recently suggested to me that the reason OpenClaw moment was so big is because it's the first time a large group of non-technical people (who otherwise only knew AI as synonymous with ChatGPT as a website) experienced the latest ag…
items.description_zh: 最近有人向我建议，OpenClaw 时刻之所以如此重要，是因为这是第一次一大群非技术人员（他们原本只知道 AI 是 ChatGPT 作为网站的同义词）体验最新的广告……

items.title: Judging by my tl there is a growing gap in understanding of AI capability.
items.title_zh: 从我的TL来看，人们对人工智能能力的理解差距越来越大。
items.description: Judging by my tl there is a growing gap in understanding of AI capability. The first issue I think is around recency and tier of use. I think a lot of people tried the free tier of ChatGPT somewhere last year and allowed it to inform their…
items.description_zh: 从我的TL来看，人们对人工智能能力的理解差距越来越大。我认为第一个问题是关于新近度和使用级别。我想很多人去年在某个地方尝试过 ChatGPT 的免费版本，并允许它通知他们的……

items.title: Both of these can be true: 1.
items.title_zh: 这两种情况都可能是真的： 1.
items.description: Both of these can be true: 1. No model is anywhere near as good as Opus for OpenClaw 2. Using Claude Code as a personal assistant replacement is OK but just doesn’t feel as “mine” as my OpenClaw
items.description_zh: 这两点都可能是正确的： 1. 没有任何模型比 OpenClaw 的 Opus 更好 2. 使用 Claude Code 作为个人助理替代品是可以的，但只是感觉不像我的 OpenClaw 那样“我的”

items.description: I think "prompting" will keep being an incredibly high-leverage skill, like writing or public speaking. It is the skill of talking to agents, mediated by the harness. My main goal is to grow the bandwidth between humans and agents, to help…
items.description_zh: 我认为“提示”将继续成为一种令人难以置信的高杠杆技能，就像写作或公开演讲一样。这是通过安全带与代理交谈的技能。我的主要目标是增加人类和代理之间的带宽，以帮助......

items.title: Allowing Sonnet to "phone a friend" (i.e.
items.title_zh: 允许十四行诗“给朋友打电话”（即
items.description: Allowing Sonnet to "phone a friend" (i.e. call Opus) increases performance while also reducing total cost since it reduces tokens spent trying to solve more complex tasks https://t.co/UmsWK4Xn32 https://t.co/aeoH2E0kb1
items.description_zh: 允许 Sonnet“给朋友打电话”（即致电 Opus）可以提高性能，同时还可以降低总成本，因为它减少了尝试解决更复杂任务所花费的代币 https://t.co/UmsWK4Xn32 https://t.co/aeoH2E0kb1
